name: laravel-database-optimization
description: Comprehensive Laravel 13 database optimization guide designed for AI agents and LLMs. Contains 33 rules across 9 categories covering query performance, indexing strategies, Eloquent optimization, Redis caching, pagination, transactions, migrations, naming conventions, and query debugging.

categories.name: Query Performance & N+1
categories.description: Eliminate N+1 queries, enforce eager loading, and select only needed columns

categories.name: Indexing Strategies
categories.description: Foreign key indexes, composite indexes, covering indexes, and full-text search

categories.name: Eloquent Optimization
categories.description: Query builder for hot paths, withCount aggregates, subquery selects, and whereHas optimization

categories.name: Caching with Redis
categories.description: Cache::remember patterns, cache invalidation, cache tags, and TTL strategies

categories.name: Pagination & Large Datasets
categories.description: Cursor pagination, chunkById processing, lazy cursors, and avoiding unbounded queries

categories.name: Transactions & Locking
categories.description: Short transactions, deadlock retry logic, and pessimistic locking for critical updates

categories.name: Migrations
categories.description: Zero-downtime migrations, concurrent index creation, and safe column additions

categories.name: Query Debugging
categories.description: EXPLAIN ANALYZE, Laravel Debugbar integration, and slow query log monitoring

categories.name: Naming & Structure
categories.description: Table, column, relationship, and migration naming conventions for Eloquent
